---
title: "Preliminaries on Computability and Algorithmic Information Theory"
date: 2026-03-03
author:
  - "Lancelot Da Costa"
  - "GPT-5.2"
description: "A minimal introduction to computability and algorithmic information theory for mathematicians."
toc: false
---

*A minimal introduction to computability and algorithmic information theory for mathematicians.*

::: {.pdf-embed}
<object data="algorithmic-information-theory.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900">
  <p>Your browser can’t display PDFs inline. <a href="algorithmic-information-theory.pdf">Download the PDF</a>.</p>
</object>
:::

Download: [algorithmic-information-theory.pdf](algorithmic-information-theory.pdf)
